item.name: Create an Order (with a custom product)

body.raw:
{
	"products": [
		{
			"name": "Test Name",
			"price_inc_tax": 10.83,
			"price_ex_tax": 10,
			"sku": "I-Will-Update-This",
			"quantity": 1
		}
		],
	  "billing_address": {
      "first_name": "API",
      "last_name": "Order",
      "company": "",
      "street_1": "123 Main Street",
      "street_2": "",
      "city": "Anywhere",
      "state": "Some State",
      "zip": "12345",
      "country": "United States",
      "country_iso2": "US",
      "phone": "",
      "email": "{{my-email}}"
    },
    "status_id": 11,
    "order_is_digital": true
}
